BusinessSetup.title: Business setup progress
BusinessSetup.score: {score}% of your public profile is complete
BusinessSetup.missingDescription: Complete these items so customers can confidently discover and book your business.

ready.label: Ready for bookings
ready.description: Customers can discover your business and book available services.

almost.label: Almost ready
almost.description: Your setup is close. Fix the remaining items before promoting your page.

notReady.label: Not ready
notReady.description: Customers may not be able to book yet. Complete the missing setup items first.

explanations.organization: The active business and membership must remain available.
explanations.businessInfo: Customers need a category, description, and phone number before they trust the listing.
explanations.coverImage: A cover image makes the public page feel complete and professional.
explanations.logo: A logo helps customers recognize your business across REZNO.
explanations.branch: Bookings need at least one active location.
explanations.hours: Every active location needs a complete seven-day hours definition.
explanations.bookingEnabled: Bookings must be enabled in business settings.
explanations.service: Customers need at least one active service to book.
explanations.offering: An active service must be available from an active location.
explanations.employee: One or more services require a staff member, so add a team member first.
explanations.published: Hidden profiles are not discoverable by customers.
explanations.table: Restaurants and cafes need active tables before the upcoming reservation experience is enabled.
explanations.menuItem: Add at least one available menu item so customers can see the menu.
explanations.menuCategory: Organize the menu into sections like drinks or main dishes so customers can browse it easily.
